description: Return a project currency configuration by company ID and project ID

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code. This value is null if the project currency configuration does not exist.

currency_display.description: Currency Display Options. This value is null if the project currency configuration does not exist.

company_currency_exchange_rate_override.description: Override for the Company Currency Exchange Rate. This value can be null.

eligible_for_financial_objs_multicurrenc.description: Whether the project is eligible for financial objects multicurrency
